Title: TC-001: Verify Draft menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin (https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/apps/page-builder/?storeId=B2B-store#/page-builder)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Login with valid credentials
3. Observe the navigation menu on the left side
4. Look at the Draft menu item
Expected Result: Draft menu item should display a counter in parentheses showing the number of draft pages (e.g., 'Draft (2)')

Title: TC-002: Verify Pending menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Pending menu item
Expected Result: Pending menu item should display a counter showing scheduled/pending pages (e.g., 'Pending [1]')

Title: TC-003: Verify Active menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Active menu item
Expected Result: Active menu item should display a counter showing published pages (e.g., 'Active [9]')

Title: TC-004: Verify Archived menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Archived menu item
Expected Result: Archived menu item should display a counter showing archived pages (e.g., 'Archived (4)')

Title: TC-005: Verify All Pages menu item displays total counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the All Pages menu item
Expected Result: All Pages menu item should display a counter showing total pages (e.g., 'All pages (16)')

Title: TC-006: Verify counters update when page status changes
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin with existing pages
Steps:
1. Note current counter values in navigation menu
2. Create a new draft page
3. Observe the Draft counter
4. Publish the page
5. Observe Draft and Active counters
Expected Result: Counters should update in real-time when page status changes

Title: TC-007: Verify Draft filter shows only draft pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with draft pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Draft menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Draft status should be displayed in the list

Title: TC-008: Verify Pending filter shows only scheduled pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with scheduled pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Pending menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Pending/Scheduled status should be displayed

Title: TC-009: Verify Active filter shows only published pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with published pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Active menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Published status should be displayed

Title: TC-010: Verify Archived filter shows only archived pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with archived pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Archived menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Archived status should be displayed

Title: TC-011: Verify All Pages shows all pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with pages in various statuses
Steps:
1. Click on All Pages menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: All pages regardless of status should be displayed

Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin

2. Observe the page blade structure

Title: TC-053: Verify Draft to Published status transition
Preconditions: User is logged in with a draft page
Steps:
1. Navigate to Draft filter
2. Click on a draft page
3. Click Publish button
4. Navigate to Active filter
Expected Result: Page status should change from Draft to Published and appear in Active section

Title: TC-054: Verify Published to Archived status transition
Preconditions: User is logged in with a published page
Steps:
1. Navigate to Active filter
2. Click on a published page
3. Click Archive button
4. Confirm archive action
5. Navigate to Archived filter
Expected Result: Page status should change from Published to Archived and appear in Archived section

Title: TC-055: Verify Draft to Archived status transition
Preconditions: User is logged in with a draft page
Steps:
1. Navigate to Draft filter
2. Click on a draft page
3. Click Archive button
4. Confirm archive action
5. Navigate to Archived filter
Expected Result: Page status should change from Draft to Archived and appear in Archived section

Title: TC-056: Verify Publish button appears for Draft pages
Preconditions: User is viewing a draft page blade
Steps:
1. Click on a draft page from the list
2. Observe the action buttons in page blade
Expected Result: Publish button should be visible for draft pages

Title: TC-057: Verify Publish button not visible for Archived pages
Preconditions: User is viewing an archived page blade
Steps:
1. Navigate to Archived filter
2. Click on an archived page
3. Observe the action buttons
Expected Result: Publish button should NOT be visible for archived pages

Title: TC-058: Verify Draft badge color styling
Preconditions: User is viewing All Pages with draft pages
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages
2. Look at a page with Draft status
3. Observe the badge color/styling
Expected Result: Draft badge should have distinct styling (different color from Published/Archived)

Title: TC-059: Verify Published badge color styling
Preconditions: User is viewing All Pages with published pages
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages
2. Look at a page with Published status
3. Observe the badge color/styling
Expected Result: Published badge should have green or positive color styling

Title: TC-060: Verify Archived badge color styling
Preconditions: User is viewing All Pages with archived pages
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages
2. Look at a page with Archived status
3. Observe the badge color/styling
Expected Result: Archived badge should have gray or muted color styling

Title: TC-061: Verify Scheduled badge color styling
Preconditions: User is viewing pages with scheduled dates
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages or Pending
2. Look at a scheduled page
3. Observe the Scheduled badge color/styling
Expected Result: Scheduled badge should have distinct color to indicate scheduling

Title: TC-062: Verify Personalized badge color styling
Preconditions: User is viewing pages with personalization
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages
2. Look at a personalized page
3. Observe the Personalized badge color/styling
Expected Result: Personalized badge should have distinct color to indicate personalization

Title: TC-063: Verify Published + Scheduled badge combination
Preconditions: User has a published page with future schedule
Steps:
1. Create or find a published page with scheduling
2. Set a future end date
3. Navigate to All Pages
4. Look at the page row
Expected Result: Page should display both 'Published' and 'Scheduled' badges

Title: TC-064: Verify Published + Personalized badge combination
Preconditions: User has a published page with personalization
Steps:
1. Create or find a published page
2. Set personalization (visibility off or user groups)
3. Navigate to All Pages
4. Look at the page row
Expected Result: Page should display both 'Published' and 'Personalized' badges

Title: TC-065: Verify Published + Scheduled + Personalized triple badge
Preconditions: User has a published page with both scheduling and personalization
Steps:
1. Create or find a published page
2. Set scheduling (start/end dates)
3. Set personalization settings
4. Navigate to All Pages
5. Look at the page row
Expected Result: Page should display 'Published', 'Scheduled', and 'Personalized' badges together

Title: TC-066: Verify Draft + Personalized badge combination
Preconditions: User has a draft page with personalization
Steps:
1. Create a new draft page
2. Set personalization settings
3. Save (do not publish)
4. Navigate to Draft filter
5. Look at the page row
Expected Result: Page should display both 'Draft' and 'Personalized' badges

Title: TC-067: Verify Archived + Personalized badge combination
Preconditions: User has an archived page with personalization
Steps:
1. Find or create a page with personalization
2. Archive the page
3. Navigate to Archived filter
4. Look at the page row
Expected Result: Page should display both 'Archived' and 'Personalized' badges

Title: TC-068: Verify Draft status label in page blade header
Preconditions: User is viewing a draft page
Steps:
1. Click on a draft page from the list
2. Observe the page blade header
Expected Result: Page blade should display 'Draft' status label in the header

Title: TC-069: Verify Published status label in page blade header
Preconditions: User is viewing a published page
Steps:
1. Click on a published page from the list
2. Observe the page blade header
Expected Result: Page blade should display 'Published' status label in the header

Title: TC-070: Verify Archived status label in page blade header
Preconditions: User is viewing an archived page
Steps:
1. Click on an archived page from the list
2. Observe the page blade header
Expected Result: Page blade should display 'Archived' status label in the header

Title: TC-071: Verify status changes after Publish action
Preconditions: User has published a draft page
Steps:
1. Open a draft page
2. Click Publish button
3. Observe page blade header
Expected Result: Status label should change from 'Draft' to 'Published' after publishing

Title: TC-072: Verify badge is visible in Draft filter view
Preconditions: User is viewing Draft filter
Steps:
1. Navigate to Draft filter
2. Look at page rows with badges
Expected Result: Draft pages should display 'Draft' badge and any additional badges (Personalized)

Title: TC-073: Verify badge is visible in Active filter view
Preconditions: User is viewing Active filter
Steps:
1. Navigate to Active filter
2. Look at page rows with badges
Expected Result: Active pages should display 'Published' badge and any additional badges (Scheduled, Personalized)

Title: TC-074: Verify badge is visible in Archived filter view
Preconditions: User is viewing Archived filter
Steps:
1. Navigate to Archived filter
2. Look at page rows with badges
Expected Result: Archived pages should display 'Archived' badge and any additional badges (Personalized)

Title: TC-075: Verify badge is visible in Pending filter view
Preconditions: User is viewing Pending filter
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pending filter
2. Look at page rows with badges
Expected Result: Pending/Scheduled pages should display 'Published', 'Scheduled' and any additional badges

Title: TC-076: Verify new unsaved page has no status badge
Preconditions: User is creating a new page
Steps:
1. Click Add button
2. Observe page blade before saving
Expected Result: New unsaved page should not display any status badge until saved

Title: TC-077: Verify badge updates after save
Preconditions: User has just saved a new page
Steps:
1. Create a new page with Name, Permalink, Language
2. Click Save
3. Navigate to All Pages
4. Look at the new page row
Expected Result: New saved page should display 'Draft' badge in the list

Title: TC-078: Verify Scheduled badge appears after setting dates
Preconditions: User is editing a published page
Steps:
1. Open a published page
2. Expand Scheduling section
3. Set future start date
4. Save the page
5. Navigate to Pending filter
Expected Result: Page should now display 'Scheduled' badge and appear in Pending filter

Title: TC-079: Verify Personalized badge appears after setting visibility
Preconditions: User is editing a page
Steps:
1. Open a page
2. Expand Personalization section
3. Toggle Visibility off
4. Save the page
5. Navigate to All Pages
Expected Result: Page should now display 'Personalized' badge in the list

Title: TC-080: Verify multiple pages with same status in grid
Preconditions: User is viewing All Pages with multiple pages of same status
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages
2. Look at multiple pages with Draft status
3. Look at multiple pages with Published status
Expected Result: All pages with same status should display consistent badge styling
